SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.project

Class JkCompileLayout

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkCompileLayout
public class JkCompileLayout extends Object
Folder layout for a project output.

  • Field Details

    • JAVA_RESOURCE_MATCHER

      public static final PathMatcher JAVA_RESOURCE_MATCHER
      Filter to consider as resources everything but java source stuff.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkCompileLayout of()
      Creates a default layout respecting Maven standard for sources.

      This means sources in [baseDir]/src/main/java and resources in [baseDir]/src/main/resources

      • and using "." directory as base dir.

  • setSourceMavenStyle

    public JkCompileLayout setSourceMavenStyle(JkCompileLayout.Concern concern)
    Creates a default layout respecting Maven standard for sources. This means :
    • For production : sources in [baseDir]/src/main/java and resources in [baseDir]/src/main/resources
    • For test : sources in [baseDir]/src/test/java and resources in [baseDir]/src/test/resources

  • setSourceSimpleStyle

    public JkCompileLayout setSourceSimpleStyle(JkCompileLayout.Concern concern)
    Sets the simple standard layout on this JkCompileLayout. This means :
    • For production code : sources and resources are located in the same directory [baseDir]/src
    • For test code : sources and resources are located in the same directory [baseDir]/test

  • setStandardOutputDirs

    public JkCompileLayout setStandardOutputDirs(JkCompileLayout.Concern concern)

    All non .java files located in a source directory will be considered as a resource (copied in classes file)
